name: EfficientIP SOLIDserver
description: EfficientIP SOLIDserver REST API for DNS, DHCP, and IPAM management including DNS record operations, zone management, and IP address tracking

actions.name: List DNS Zones
actions.description: Retrieve all DNS zones managed by SOLIDserver

parameters.name: WHERE
parameters.description: Filter expression for zone queries (e.g., dns_name='example.com')

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get DNS Zone
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific DNS zone

actions.name: List DNS Resource Records
actions.description: Retrieve all DNS resource records in a zone or matching criteria

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

actions.name: Add DNS Record
actions.description: Create a new DNS resource record in a zone

parameters.name: dns_name
parameters.description: DNS server name hosting the zone

parameters.name: rr_name
parameters.description: Full name of the DNS record (FQDN)

parameters.name: rr_type
parameters.description: Record type: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, PTR, SRV, NS

parameters.name: rr_value1
parameters.description: Primary record value (IP address, hostname, etc.)

actions.name: Delete DNS Record
actions.description: Delete an existing DNS resource record

parameters.name: rr_id
parameters.description: ID of the resource record to delete

actions.name: List IP Addresses
actions.description: Retrieve IP addresses and their assignment status from IPAM

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of addresses to return

actions.name: Add IP Address
actions.description: Register a new IP address in IPAM with associated name and metadata

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Hostname or label for the IP address

actions.name: Find Free IP Address
actions.description: Find the next available IP address in a subnet

parameters.name: subnet_id
parameters.description: ID of the subnet to search for free addresses

parameters.name: max_find
parameters.description: Number of free addresses to find

actions.name: List DHCP Scopes
actions.description: Retrieve all DHCP scopes and their configuration
